title: Synthetic Planted-Synergy Classification Datasets for Signed Spectral Clustering Validation
summary: Demonstrates generation of synthetic classification datasets with planted synergistic feature modules for validating signed spectral clustering. The notebook generates 3 dataset variants (easy 2-module XOR, medium 4-module mixed XOR/AND, no-structure control), runs validation sanity checks (class balance, marginal MI, joint MI, redundancy correlation), and visualizes marginal MI per feature — showing that XOR features have near-zero marginal MI while interaction terms are highly informative. Uses 5000 samples per variant with 5-fold stratified CV splits. Mini demo data contains 50 balanced examples from the easy_2mod_xor variant.
